channel.title: WiiCHiCKEN'S AWESOME BLOG
channel.description: the most awesome blog in the history of blogging. i don't know if i will be updating this feed tho

item.title: discord, PLEASE quit telling me people are in a voice channel
item.description: optimizing your platform for more engagement is hurting the way i engage with others

item.title: Obscure Twitter Features That Died in A/B Testing
item.description: before elon musk, twitter devs used to add whatever to the app

item.title: Who is Instagram Instants For?
item.description: meta loves adding features people didn't know they didn't need

item.title: Trump is Calling Everyone Pro-Transgender a Terrorist. This Should Alarm You
item.description: Everyone is affected. We need to stand up for what is right.

item.title: How to Make My Sona niqiu in Tomodachi Life
item.description: making my sona in Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream

item.title: Tenor GIF Search is Going to Die
item.description: the tenor developer api is shutting down and things are looking bleak

item.title: TikTok's Secret Depressing Feed
item.description: tiktok has a hidden feed that only shows you depressing videos

item.title: 2 Years of wiggle.monster
item.description: this website is officially 2 years old!
